name: project-routines
description: Common personal product and engineering routines, packaged as Claude Code plugins and skills — run on demand or wired up to scheduled automation and triggers

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality. Removes AI-generated slop and over-engineering, defers to project conventions, and focuses on recently modified code.

plugins.name: retro
plugins.description: Weekly engineering retrospective — a read-only, schedulable routine that reviews shipping cadence, test health, and progress, then recommends 1-3 concrete improvements.
